vendor_opencl.notes: Qualcomm vendor OpenCL driver. Full kernel parity proven. Production primary.

turnip_vulkan.performance: FAIL (10-30x slower than CPU due to dispatch overhead)
turnip_vulkan.notes: Mesa Turnip via KGSL. Correct but too slow for production. Fallback for correctness verification only.

rusticl_opencl.root_cause: Gallium pipe-loader requires /dev/dri/renderD128. Termux has no DRM render nodes.
rusticl_opencl.notes: Builds and platform initializes but cannot access GPU without DRM. Research only.

rules: vendor_opencl is always preferred for production workloads
turnip_vulkan used only for correctness cross-validation
rusticl_opencl cannot be used until DRM render node available
No backend claims READY without device evidence

truth_assertions: Vendor OpenCL is the only production-viable backend
Turnip Vulkan compute is correct but 10-30x slower than CPU
Rusticl builds but has zero runtime capability on this device
No false READY claims exist in this manifest
